title: Greek Dip
ingredients: 2 8-ounce blocks of cream cheese, at room temperature
1 8-ounce container of feta cheese – plain or flavored
Oregano – 1 tablespoon chopped if fresh, 1 teaspoon if dried
Basil – 1-2 tablespoons chopped if fresh, 1 ½ teaspoon if dried
instructions: Place all ingredients in food processor.  Blend well.  Drizzle in olive oil while on low speed to make spreading consistency.  Refrigerate for at least 2 hours for flavors to marry.  Best if served at room temperature.
Serve with pita chips, pita bread wedges, veggies, or for a topping with Greek chicken sandwiches.
Optional – Add ¼ cup sundried tomatoes packed in oil to above ingredients.  Gives a rosy glow to color of dip.
Recipe from my beloved friend, Lisa Ames
